name: Super Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine brown sugar, sugar, cream substitute, and butter in a large saucepan.
2. Cook to 234 degrees F (112 degrees C).
3. Remove from heat, let bubbles subside.
4. Add marshmallow creme, semisweet chocolate, and butterscotch coating. Stir until well blended.
5. Stir in chopped nuts and vanilla.
6. Pat into a buttered 9-inch square pan.
7. Cut into squares when cool. Makes about 64 pieces.
